rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Deft Rockwell Automation, Inc. To Compensate Dr. Richard Cohen, M.D. His Ordinary And Reasonable Fees; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 8, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Rockwell Automation, Inc. to compensate Dr. Richard Cohen his ordinary and reasonable fees and request for sanctions is denied. The deposition was noticed for and understood by Dr. Cohen¿s counsel as seeking only historical information about Dr. Cohen¿s work at Varian and not as an expert, or as a provider of current medical information. Neither Dr. Cohen nor his counsel conditioned the deposition going forward on payment of an ¿expert fee¿ nor was there any court order or stipulation in advance of the deposition providing for payment of any fee to Dr. Cohen other than the standard witness fee. Under these circumstances, and notwithstanding the statement of Dr. Cohen¿s counsel at the outset of the deposition that Dr. Cohen will be seeking an expert fee, and in the absence of any authority providing for payment of such a fee, no expert fee need be paid to Dr. Cohen. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT G. EWING VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 8, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant A.O. Smith Corporation¿s motion to compel responses to written discovery and to deem requests for admissions admitted and for monetary sanctions is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed August 24. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RORY SNELL VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LLD
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant J.T. Thorpe Son, Inc. To Provide Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 8, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel defendant J.T. Thorpe & Son to provide responses to plaintiff¿s request for production of documents and for sanctions is continued to September 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)
